title: chatham #2856
definition:
1) to seal, seal up, affix a seal
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to seal, affix one's seal
        1a2) to seal up, fasten up by sealing
    1b) (Niphal) to seal
    1c) (Piel) to lock up
    1d) (Hiphil) to be stopped
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to seal, seal up, affix a seal
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to seal, affix one's seal
        1a2) to seal up, fasten up by sealing
    1b) (Niphal) to seal
    1c) (Piel) to lock up
    1d) (Hiphil) to be stopped

    NASB:  to seal, affix a seal, seal up
